# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read

jobs:
  validate-and-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          
      - name: Sanitize PR metadata
        id: sanitize
        run: |
          # Sanitize PR title - remove special characters and limit length
          PR_TITLE="${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"
          SAFE_TITLE=$(echo "$PR_TITLE" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]-_.' | cut -c1-100)
          echo "safe_title=$SAFE_TITLE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
          # Sanitize PR description - remove special characters and limit length
          PR_BODY="${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}"
          SAFE_BODY=$(echo "$PR_BODY" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:][:punct:]\n' | cut -c1-500)
          echo "safe_body<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$SAFE_BODY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
          # Extract PR number and author (trusted GitHub context)
          echo "pr_number=${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_author=${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_url=${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
      - name: Validate PR metadata
        run: |
          # Ensure sanitized values are not empty
          if [ -z "${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.safe_title }}" ]; then
            echo "Error: PR title is empty or invalid"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          # Validate PR number is numeric
          if ! [[ "${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Error: Invalid PR number"
            exit 1
          fi
          
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          echo "Building PR #${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }}"
          echo "Feature: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.safe_title }}"
          # Add your build commands here
          # npm install && npm run build
          # or
          # ./gradlew build
          
      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          echo "Running tests for PR #${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }}"
          # Add your test commands here
          # npm test
          
      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        run: |
          BUILD_ID="${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_number }}"
          TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          
          echo "build_id=$BUILD_ID" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "timestamp=$TIMESTAMP" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
          # Create release notes entry (sanitized)
          cat > release-notes.txt << 'EOF'
          PR #${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.safe_title }}
          Author: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_author }}
          Build: $BUILD_ID
          Timestamp: $TIMESTAMP
          URL: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_url }}
          EOF
          
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-metadata-pr-${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: release-notes.txt
          retention-days: 30
          
      - name: Send notification (Slack example)
        if: always()
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
            echo "Slack webhook not configured, skipping notification"
            exit 0
          fi
          
          STATUS="${{ job.status }}"
          COLOR="good"
          if [ "$STATUS" != "success" ]; then
            COLOR="danger"
          fi
          
          # Create JSON payload with sanitized data (no user input in executable fields)
          PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
          {
            "attachments": [{
              "color": "$COLOR",
              "title": "PR Build $STATUS",
              "fields": [
                {
                  "title": "PR Number",
                  "value": "${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }}",
                  "short": true
                },
                {
                  "title": "Title",
                  "value": "${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.safe_title }}",
                  "short": true
                },
                {
                  "title": "Author",
                  "value": "${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_author }}",
                  "short": true
                },
                {
                  "title": "Build ID",
                  "value": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_id }}",
                  "short": true
                },
                {
                  "title": "Link",
                  "value": "<${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_url }}|View PR>",
                  "short": false
                }
              ],
              "footer": "GitHub Actions",
              "ts": $(date +%s)
            }]
          }
          EOF
          )
          
          curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data "$PAYLOAD" \
            "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"
            
      - name: Comment on PR
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            const status = '${{ job.status }}';
            const emoji = status === 'success' ? '✅' : '❌';
            const prNumber = ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.pr_number }};
            const buildId = '${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_id }}';
            
            const body = `${emoji} **Build ${status}**
            
            - **PR**: #${prNumber}
            - **Build ID**: \`${buildId}\`
            - **Timestamp**: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.timestamp }}
            - **Workflow**: [View Run](https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
            
            This build information has been recorded for release notes.`;
            
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber,
              body: body
            });
